hero.headline: Isabela Machado
hero.value: Lighting, framing and pacing driven by script. On-camera presence with studio polish.

about.title: About / Press Kit
about.subtitle: Control room snapshot
about.body: I’m Isabela Machado — Radio & TV student (1st semester) with a studio eye. Lighting, framing and pacing led by the script. On-camera presence, editorial narrative and editing that works on digital screens and broadcast.

showreel.title: Showreel live + doc
showreel.subtitle: Scenes that sum up my flow
showreel.description: Studio magazine, quick doc and vertical pack with clean graphics. I bring pace, hosting and lean post to deliver broadcast and social versions.
showreel.hint: Ask for the private link to watch.
showreel.ctaDeck: I send the deck with credits, tech setup and prep time.

process.title: Delivery process
process.subtitle: Script locked, camera on, master sent
process.description: I align studio hosting, agile doc and vertical work with the same care: clear rundown, safe camera, clean audio and finishing tailored to channel or brand.
